content:
Your code is already in the correct format. It splits the string by spaces to separate the phase and then further separates each part based on the "–" symbol. It retrieves the price from the priceList using the product name (productDetails[1]), converts the order amount to an integer, multiplies it with the retrieved price, and assigns it to the variable 'orderPrice'. 

Please note that you need to make sure that your priceList is populated before running this code. If it's not, you might want to handle the case where priceList doesn't contain a product with the name specified in orderData[0].
